# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:

  EC2Instance:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    Properties:
      ImageId: 'ami-07d02ee1eeb0c996c'
      InstanceType: 't2.micro'
      KeyName: 'your-ssh-key'
      BlockDeviceMappings: 
        - DeviceName: '/dev/sda1'
          Ebs: 
            VolumeSize: '50'
            VolumeType: 'gp2'

Outputs:

  InstanceID:
    Description: The Instance ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  PublicIP:
    Description: The public IP address of the launched instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
  PublicDNS:
    Description: The public DNS name of the launched instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicDnsName
